untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (double top structure with Adam & Eve variant) cannot be expressed using only allowed price/technical indicators. Requires pattern recognition logic (identifying two peaks at similar levels, confirmation line, and measurement-based target calculation using 'height / 2' rule). Industry cross-correlation also requires external data beyond single-instrument indicators.
translation_notes: Translated breakout below confirmation line as close crossing below pivot (proxy for support/resistance level). Volume spike on breakout translated as volume > prev_volume. Stop loss set to reasonable 3% given 5% failure rate mentioned. Target calculation (height/2 from confirmation line) requires pattern-specific measurement logic not available in standard indicators. Market regime filter correctly set to TRENDING_DOWN (bear market). Missing: explicit double-top pattern detection, industry sector correlation check, and Bulkowski's specific measurement rule for profit target.
